svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="缓存层级" id="ssr3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-127" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="460" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="cdn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="CDN 缓存（静态资源）
JS / CSS / 图片 / SSG 预渲染页
TTL: 7-30 天" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="BFF 本地缓存（接口聚合）
高频低频更新接口
TTL: 5-15 分钟" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="360" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redis" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="Redis 缓存（接口数据 + 兜底）
后端挂了读这里
TTL: 10s - 15min 按接口分" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="660" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="browser" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="浏览器缓存
Cache-Control / ETag
用户偏好 / 登录态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="60" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fallback" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="CDN 兜底页
全实例挂时 rewrite 到这
静态 HTML" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="360" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="csr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="CSR 降级渲染
SSR 全慢时切客户端渲染
空 HTML + 前端取数" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="660" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ar" edge="1" parent="1" source="bff" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;dashed=1;" target="redis" value="后端异常时：BFF 读 Redis 兜底"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="上排是「正常链路」的缓存加速，下排是「异常链路」的兜底降级。缓存既提速也兜底，一物两用。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="780" x="100" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 上排是「正常链路」的缓存加速，下排是「异常链路」的兜底降级。缓存既提速也兜底，一物两用。
